# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - resource: 'project'
    name: example-project
    location: us-central1

  - name: mysql-instance
    type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:projects.instances
    properties:
      project: ${ resources['project'].selfLink }
      instanceConfig: REGIONAL
      databaseVersion: MYSQL_8_0
      settings:
        tier: db-n1-standard-2
        availabilityType: ZONAL

  - name: cloudsql-db
    type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:projects.instances.databases
    properties:
      project: ${ resources['project'].selfLink }
      instance: ${resources['mysql-instance'].selfLink}
      databaseId: ${ 'database-id' }

  - name: sql-server
    type: google.sqlserver.SqlServer
    properties:
      location: us-central1
      dbInstance: ${ resources['mysql-instance'].selfLink }

  - name: cloud-storage-bucket
    type: gcp-types/storage-v1beta4:buckets
    properties:
      project: ${ resources['project'].selfLink }
      location: us-central1

  - name: network
    type: google_compute_network
    properties:
      project: ${ resources['project'].selfLink }
      routingConfig: {}
      autoCreateSubnetworks: true
      network: my-network

  - name: sub-network
    type: google_compute_subnetwork
    properties:
      project: ${ resources['project'].selfLink }
      region: us-central1
      network: ${resources['network'].selfLink}
      ipCidrRange: '10.128.0.0/20'

  - name: default-nat-rules
    type: google_compute_firewall
    properties:
      project: ${ resources['project'].selfLink }
      network: ${resources['network'].selfLink}
      sourceRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0

  - name: compute-engine
    type: gcp-types/compute-v1:projects.instances
    properties:
      project: ${ resources['project'].selfLink }
      zone: us-central1-a
      machineType: n1-standard-4
      disks:
        -
          sourceImage: 'https://www.googleapis.com/compute/v1/projects/debian-cloud/global/images/debian-9-stretch-v20200915'
          boot: true

  - name: load-balancer
    type: google_compute_region_backend_service
    properties:
      project: ${ resources['project'].selfLink }
      region: us-central1
      backendConfigId: ${ 'backend-config-id' }

  - name: target-pool
    type: google_compute_region_target_http_proxy
    properties:
      project: ${ resources['project'].selfLink }
      region: us-central1
      urlMap: ${resources['load-balancer'].selfLink}

  - name: health-checks
    type: google_compute_health_check
    properties:
      project: ${ resources['project'].selfLink }
      portName: healthcheck

  - name: load-balancing-forwarding-rule
    type: google_compute_region_forwarding_rule
    properties:
      project: ${ resources['project'].selfLink }
      region: us-central1
      target: ${resources['target-pool'].selfLink}
      backendService: ${resources['load-balancer'].selfLink}

  - name: instance-template
    type: gcp-types/compute-v1:projects.instanceTemplates
    properties:
      project: ${ resources['project'].selfLink }
      locations:
        - 'us-central1'
      instances:
        -
          machineType: n1-standard-4

  - name: auto-scale-policy
    type: google_compute_region_auto_scaling_policy
    properties:
      project: ${ resources['project'].selfLink }
      region: us-central1
      minNumReplicas: 1
      maxNumReplicas: 5

  - name: target-instance-group
    type: gcp-types/compute-v1:projects.instanceGroups
    properties:
      project: ${ resources['project'].selfLink }
      region: us-central1
